versions.name: James C. Justice National Scout Camp
versions.summary: Scouts BSA and Venturing resident camp at the Summit Bechtel Reserve in West Virginia, offering more than 70 merit badges, the Brownsea first-year program, and access to high-adventure venues including whitewater, ziplining, BMX, and mountain biking.

provenance.notes: Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
